RegLoan Bank — Underwriting Policy & Rate Sheet Document POL-0007 Page 1 of 2 APR Rate Matrix by FICO × LTV FICO Band LTV <=80% LTV 81-90% LTV 91-100% LTV 101-110% LTV 111-120% 580-619 7.46% 12.27% 10.0% 3.7% 12.66% 620-659 6.97% 12.42% 6.37% 5.77% 4.79% 660-699 12.28% 6.0% 10.78% 12.32% 10.46% Manual review — UW
